files.diff:
diff --git a/sim_notes.md b/sim_notes.md
index 1cb101f..c77e59e 100644
--- a/sim_notes.md
+++ b/sim_notes.md
@@ -47,2 +47,9 @@ Day 42 / Week 6 observations:
 - Open issues rose to 25 but all are same-day; ops resolved 104 issues. Social now highlights support/community more than quota.
 - Week 6 adjustment: scale S2 content and S1 referral, raise global and targeted ops, keep dev modest, and address professional support concerns publicly.
+
+Day 49 / Week 7 observations:
+- Growth accelerated to 420 new subscribers from 1,635 leads. Cash only fell about $27k despite higher acquisition and support spend.
+- S2 content remained excellent: 286 paid subscribers from 1,330 leads on $11.2k spend, with 118 B and 62 C. S1 referral added 119 A users on $2.1k spend.
+- Usage peaked at 94k/day, still under tier-1 capacity, but continued growth could approach the 200k/day limit.
+- Open issues rose to 70, all same-day; ops resolved 267 issues. The backlog is high-volume rather than aging, but it needs more support capacity.
+- Social now shows S2 quality consistency concerns in higher-stakes workflows. Week 7 adjustment: upgrade A to tier 2, raise capacity, increase S2-targeted dev, and scale support plus proven acquisition channels.
